title: Over 70 killed in attacks in Mali; Al-Qaeda linked JNIM claims responsibility
description: Central Mali is reeling from a brutal wave of jihadist attacks, with at least 70 lives lost in recent days. The Al-Qaeda-linked JNIM has claimed responsibility for the coordinated assaults, which targeted villages that resisted their control. This escalating violence follows earlier deadly incidents and a prison raid, highlighting the persistent threat in the region.

title: 'Khamma Ghani': Gill, Rashid tease Rajasthan with witty social media post
description: Gujarat Titans crushed Rajasthan Royals by 77 runs after posting 229/4, powered by Shubman Gill’s 84 and Sai Sudharsan’s 55. Rashid Khan starred with 4/33 as Rajasthan collapsed for 152 despite a quickfire 36 from teenager Vaibhav Sooryavanshi. Gill later mocked Rajasthan online, posting: “Pink city, blue result. Khamma Ghani.”

title: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship to arrive in Tenerife today; WHO chief reaches Spanish island
description: Passengers from the hantavirus-affected MV Hondius will disembark in Tenerife on Sunday. Three passengers have died, and five others tested positive after leaving the ship. The Andes virus strain, which can spread person-to-person, was detected. Spanish authorities confirmed the deceased and their belongings will not be unloaded.

Gujarat Titans posted 229/4 against them in Jaipur. Shubman Gill and Sai Sudharsan starred for GT. This puts immense pressure on Rajasthan's batting.

title: I'm CM for all, says Suvendu Adhikari, shuts up 'Jai Shri Ram' chant
description: In his inaugural address, Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari called on his supporters at Jorasanko Thakurbari to move away from partisan slogans like 'Jai Shri Ram,' stating that his leadership embodies the spirit of every citizen in Bengal. He emphasized the urgent need to repair and rejuvenate the state's educational and cultural landscape, drawing inspiration from Rabindranath Tagore’s vision.

title: ‘Missiles, drones locked on US targets’: Iran’s fresh threat to US as peace talks are stalled
Lawyers, doctors feel MTP law puts medical assent over women’s autonomy, seek change
description: In a wave of legal challenges tied to the Medical Termination of Pregnancy (MTP) Act, doctors are under heightened scrutiny. Even with an expanded window for obtaining abortions, critics argue that the legislation still favors medical authority over women's rights to choose. Advocates are pushing for the complete decriminalization of abortion and full autonomy for women in making these decisions.

Despite a strong batting display and a comfortable victory, Gill highlighted areas for improvement, emphasizing aggressive bowling and crucial partnerships. He also confirmed a minor ankle scare during the innings, as the team continues its winning streak.

description: A trespasser was killed after being struck by a Frontier Airlines flight during takeoff at Denver International Airport. The individual had breached security by jumping the perimeter fence and running onto the runway. Seventeen people were injured in the incident, with the pilot stopping takeoff procedures immediately.

title: Census effect: Cities will see ‘less crime’ next year
description: Crime rates in Indian cities are set to show a decline in 2027 due to a mathematical glitch in National Crime Records Bureau (NCRB) calculations. NCRB uses outdated Census population figures as denominators, causing crime rates to appear inflated until the next Census updates these numbers, leading to dramatic drops.

This fresh gesture added a new dimension to his iconic on-field expressions, following a crucial wicket taken by Donovan Ferreira.

description: A 97-year-old lifelong RSS swayamsevak and grassroots political worker, Makhanlal Sarkar, received a lifetime honour from Prime Minister Narendra Modi at a recent oath-taking ceremony. Sarkar, an aide to Bharatiya Jana Sangh founder Syama Prasad Mookerjee, expressed fulfillment after Modi touched his feet.

title: Miami boat explosion: At least 15 injured near Haulover Sandbar - what we know so far
description: A boat explosion near Miami's Haulover Sandbar on Saturday afternoon sent at least 11 people to hospitals. Emergency crews responded to the "possible vessel explosion" in Biscayne Bay, a popular party spot. A charter boat was involved, with preliminary information suggesting a potential gas leak. A large-scale rescue operation was launched, and an investigation into the cause is ongoing.

title: CBI searches 17 locations in Reliance ADA Group cases
description: In recent months, the CBI has filed seven cases against Group entities based on complaints from various Public Sector Banks and LIC regarding alleged frauds involving thousands of crores

title: Kejriwal slams PM Modi over ED raids in Punjab
description: ‘Atrocities’ by Modi against Punjab reminds of Aurangzeb, says AAP supremo

title: DMK publication hits out at Rahul for his 'lack of gratitude'
description: DMK mouthpiece Murasoli criticized Congress and Rahul Gandhi for alleged lack of gratitude after the party left the DMK-led alliance. The editorial highlighted DMK chief M K Stalin's role in forming the INDIA bloc and supporting Congress's inclusion, despite opposition from other leaders. Murasoli also accused Congress members close to Gandhi of targeting the DMK government.

title: What is the Governor’s role in a hung Assembly?
description: Why has Governor Rajendra Arlekar refused to swear in TVK party president Vijay as the new Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu? What is the primary objective of the Governor in such situations? What has the Supreme Court ruled in the past? Is the floor test the best way of proving majority?

title: What if Vijay had joined in 2009, Congress wonders
description: Questions arise if Congress could have achieved greater success in Tamil Nadu had actor Vijay's past interaction with Rahul Gandhi materialized into a political alliance. Now, 17 years later, a partnership is forming as Rahul Gandhi is set to attend Vijay's oath-taking ceremony, marking a significant political shift.

title: ‘Bid to prevent central rule’: VCK extends outside support to Vijay govt, to stay in DMK alliance
description: VCK chief Thol Thirumavalavan has pledged unconditional support to actor-politician Vijay's government, aiming to ensure political stability and prevent President's rule in Tamil Nadu. This move, communicated to DMK chief MK Stalin, allows TVK to navigate the state's new coalition landscape. VCK will remain in the DMK-led alliance but will not join the cabinet, prioritizing political credibility over ministerial berths.

title: What is India’s first orbital data centre satellite?
description: What is an orbital data centre? Why are global firms interested? What does the Pixxel-Sarvam partnership involve?

title: Congress struggles in Kerala for consensus as CM hopefuls push claims
description: Congress leaders Mallikarjun Kharge and Rahul Gandhi are deliberating on the next Chief Minister of Kerala. V D Satheesan, K C Venugopal, and Ramesh Chennithala are the key contenders. The party is also addressing factional protests. A decision is expected soon after consulting with party legislators and allies. The leadership aims for consensus to avoid internal discord.

title: Can data centres in orbit solve for AI models’ soaring energy demand?
description: Google’s Project Suncatcher is experimenting with a novel approach: putting datacentres servicing AI workloads in low-earth orbit and letting them feed on solar energy; ISRO is also reportedly studying space-based datacentre technology

title: Delhi HC protects Shashi Tharoor's personality rights; orders blocking of deepfakes
description: The Delhi High Court granted interim relief to Congress MP Shashi Tharoor, ordering the removal of AI-generated deepfakes and synthetic media across digital platforms. The court recognized Tharoor's enforceable personality and publicity rights, barring the misappropriation of his name, image, voice, and speaking style for any commercial, political, or malicious purpose.

title: Koli women chart new waters, set up seafood company
description: Mumbai's Koli women are transforming their traditional fish trade into a corporate venture with Daryavardi Producer Company Limited. This community-owned enterprise, inspired by the Amul model, focuses on streamlined operations, product development, and modern marketing.  Learning about improved packaging, they aim to elevate their business from a cottage industry to a significant player in the Blue Economy.

description: Lt Gen NS Raja Subramani (retd) has been appointed the new Chief of Defence Staff, tasked with implementing the theaterisation model. Vice-Admiral Krishna Swaminathan will take over as the next chief of the Indian Navy, focusing on modernization. Both appointments are effective from May 30 and May 31 respectively.

title: Test of advanced Agni missile with multiple warheads technology a success: Defence ministry
description: India successfully conducted a flight-trial of an advanced Agni missile equipped with a Multiple Independently Targeted Re-entry Vehicle (MIRV) system. This demonstration showcased the nation's capability to strike multiple strategic targets with a single missile, significantly enhancing defence preparedness against growing threats.

title: Indian Coast Guard commissions new-gen fast patrol vessel 'Achal'
description: The Indian Coast Guard has commissioned ICGS Achal, the fifth Adamya-class fast patrol vessel, enhancing its coastal security and offshore asset protection. Built with 60% indigenous content at Goa Shipyard Ltd for Rs 473 crore, the vessel signifies India's growing self-reliance in defence manufacturing and will undertake diverse maritime operations.

title: BSF fires 'in self-defence', kills 2 Bangladeshis on Tripura border
description: Two suspected Bangladeshi smugglers were killed by BSF fire along the Tripura border on Friday night. The incident occurred near Kamalasagar border outpost when a group of smugglers, allegedly aided by villagers, began pelting stones at troops after being challenged during a smuggling attempt. The deceased were identified and their bodies handed over to the Border Guard Bangladesh.

'Only one who escaped unhurt': Probe in murder of Suvendu's aide shifts focus to 3rd man in SUV
description: A driver, Montu Mondal, is the sole survivor of an attack that killed Chandranath Rath and Buddhadeb Bera. Mondal, who hid in the rear of the SUV, provided a detailed account of the 50-second assault to investigators. The SIT is now focusing on his testimony to reconstruct the events and identify potential surveillance.

title: Former NFL scout links Dianna Russini to Bill Belichick, Sean Payton
description: The Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini controversy intensified after a former NFL scout alleged that the veteran insider had relationships with several prominent NFL figures, including Bill Belichick and Sean Payton. The claims spread rapidly online following renewed attention from TMZ reports and viral social media discussions. Sports analyst Jason Whitlock also mocked the scandal publicly, calling it “The Love Bloat.” Despite the growing controversy, Patriots players reportedly continue supporting Vrabel ahead of the upcoming season.

title: Happy Mother's day: Top 100 wishes, messages, images, GIFs and greetings card
description: This Mother's Day, move beyond generic greetings to honor the women who raised you with meaningful messages. The article offers categorized heartfelt, witty, and minimalist quotes, acknowledging the "mental load" and celebrating "mothers of choice."

title: After 43 yrs, US family sells electrical firm for $1.7bn; gives 540 workers $240m
description: A US-based businessman, Graham Walker, gifted his 540 employees a staggering $240 million from the $1.7 billion sale of his family's company, Fibrebond Corp. This generous act, where workers received an average of $443,000, stemmed from a condition Walker imposed before the sale to power-management giant Eaton.

title: Coinbase reports service issues, points finger at AWS cloud outage
description: A cooling issue at an Amazon Web Services data center in Northern Virginia caused widespread service disruptions. Cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase and derivatives giant CME Group were among the affected. AWS confirmed increased temperatures in a single data center impacted services. Efforts to restore cooling capacity led to extended outages for some customers. The primary issue is now resolved.

title: 'You have 10 working days to voluntarily recognise unions': Google UK staff tells company
description: Google's DeepMind employees are demanding union recognition amid concerns over their AI technology's use by the US and Israeli militaries. Workers seek a commitment against developing AI weapons and surveillance tools, urging management to voluntarily recognize their unions or face legal action. The move highlights growing anxieties about AI's ethical implications and its potential for harm.
